refnamediv.refpurpose: Blend a binary or label mask over an image.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imoverlaymask(image, mask) out = imoverlaymask(image, mask, rgb, alpha, boundary)

listitem.para: Boolean, binary, or label mask. %t and nonzero numeric pixels are treated as foreground.
Overlay opacity from 0 to 1. Default is 0.35.
Boolean flag to draw a stronger mask boundary.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: imoverlaymask creates a reusable overlay image for segmentation masks and binary regions. It keeps image-space orientation, so it is suitable for DNN segmentation post-processing.

refsection.title: Examples
